alt: High-resolution museum specimen demonstrating the heavy, large build of the flightless kakapo
caption: The kakapo is the world's heaviest living parrot, with large males weighing over 4 kilograms (9 lbs).
acquisitionNotes: Pristine museum archival image demonstrating physical bulk and skeletal robusticity. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/b8/Strigops_habroptilus_%2848720196077%29.jpg
